title: V&V's Variated Pumpkins
description: Texture variants to carved pumpkins and jack'o'lanterns
body:
This pack includes carved pumpkins and jack'o'lanters texture variations from "Vegetations & Variations"(https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/plantsvegetations).

It provides 12 new variants to both blocks, including a few easter eggs.
